title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・あげてけ！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the support of her friends, Tosen Jordan
makes a spectacular first place finish in the
autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Cheers and applause thunder throughout the
course, with no signs of dying down.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan smiles at me and says, "Am I the
greatest dummy ever or what?"
